title: JorMicrobe/Culture_Media_Isolation_Methods_Coral-Associated_Microbes: Culture_Media_Project_Stage_1_2025
author: Jordan Ruiz-Toquica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This study shows that culturing coral-associated bacteria is governed by interacting effects of medium composition, salt chemistry, and isolation strategy, rather than the effect of a single condition.
steps_raw: This study shows that culturing coral-associated bacteria is governed by interacting effects of medium composition, salt chemistry, and isolation strategy, rather than the effect of a single condition.
